test.observation: 157 tests passed, 0 failed across 9 test suites

lint.observation: 44 files in src/ have pre-existing formatting issues (not from this feature). The migration script itself (scripts/migrate-to-nanocore.ts) was fixed. The src/ formatting issues pre-date this feature.

appliedUpdates.description: Added migration-test command for running shell integration tests (bash tests/test-migration.sh)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: when writing migration-related tests, prefer shell integration tests (tests/test-migration.sh pattern using HOME= overrides and temp directories) over shallow unit tests that only verify argument parsing. The Migrator class should be refactored to be independently importable for direct unit testing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature migration-script-core has unit tests that only verify argument values exist in arrays rather than testing actual Migrator behavior. The shell integration test provides much better coverage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document removeComments and trailing comma utilities in library/
rejectedObservations.reason: These are implementation details of a single script, not patterns needed across the codebase. Too low-level for library documentation.
maskSecret is a single utility function in one script. Not a cross-cutting pattern that workers need to know about.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document migration source paths in library/
rejectedObservations.reason: Migration source paths are specific to the migration script and already documented in mission.md. Not operational knowledge needed by workers.
